name: tabtab
description: Minimal inline code completion for OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-compatible APIs.

tabtab.maxTokens.description: Legacy alias for tabtab.maxOutputTokens when maxOutputTokens is not set.

tabtab.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay for automatic inline completions in milliseconds.

tabtab.maxPromptTokens.description: Maximum approximate prompt tokens. Budget is split as prefix 65%, suffix 20%, extra context 15%.

tabtab.maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum tokens generated for automatic inline completions.

tabtab.manualMaxOutputTokens.description: Maximum tokens generated for manually invoked inline completions.

tabtab.maxCompletionLines.description: Maximum number of lines returned for automatic inline completions.

tabtab.manualMaxCompletionLines.description: Maximum number of lines returned for manually invoked inline completions.

tabtab.maxRelatedFiles.description: Maximum related files or LSP snippets included as extra context.

tabtab.maxRelatedFileBytes.description: Maximum size in bytes for a related file considered as extra context.

tabtab.lspTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for definition/declaration context lookup in milliseconds.

tabtab.idleTriggerEnabled.description: Trigger an automatic inline completion after the cursor and document stay idle.

tabtab.idleTriggerMs.description: Idle delay before triggering an automatic inline completion in milliseconds.

tabtab.idleTriggerCooldownMs.description: Minimum time between idle-triggered inline completion attempts in milliseconds.

tabtab.sendThinkingDisabled.description: Send thinking disabled on OpenAI-compatible completion requests when supported by the API.

tabtab.requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for each API request in milliseconds.

tabtab.projectProfile.enabled.description: Enable project profile detection and inject the detected project profile into FIM prompts.

tabtab.contextCache.enabled.description: Enable workspace context cache for FIM completions.

tabtab.includeAssist.enabled.description: Enable missing include hints from VSCode diagnostics.

tabtab.includeAssist.standardLibrary.ena.description: Enable missing C/C++ standard library include hints.

tabtab.includeAssist.projectHeaders.enab.description: Enable missing project-local header include hints.

tabtab.localHeaderIndex.enabled.description: Enable background local header symbol indexing.

tabtab.localHeaderIndex.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns excluded from local header indexing.

tabtab.contextCache.maxInjectedChars.description: Maximum number of characters injected from workspace context cache.

tabtab.projectProfile.manualProfile.description: Manually override the detected project profile. If non-empty, this value is used instead of auto-detected profile.

tabtab.projectProfile.showInStatusBar.description: Show the current project profile in the VSCode status bar.

tabtab.projectProfile.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of project files used for project profile detection.

tabtab.projectProfile.maxChars.description: Maximum number of characters from the project structure passed to project profile detection.
